{"society_power": 4.5, "state_power": 1.5, "society_change": -1.5, "state_change": -3.5, "key_event": "Outbreak of civil war and state collapse (1975)", "reasoning": "The 1975 civil war, Cairo Agreement, PLO buildup, and Syrian intervention caused near-total collapse of central authority (state to 1.5). Society power reflects proliferating armed militias\u2014not corridor-style civic mobilization but fragmented, warlord-driven armed factions; the assassination of Jumblatt and pure sectarian fragmentation actually reduce genuine autonomous, accountability-producing civil society from its 1960s peak."}
